title: two tests use is_null() to check presence in updated map
description: test_message_set_update_reaction (line 2866) and test_space_set_member_patch (line 3165) use result['updated'][id].is_null() to assert the id appears in the updated map. serde_json returns Value::Null for missing keys, so this assertion passes whether the id is in updated OR absent (in notUpdated or dropped entirely). c8bf9c7 already fixed one instance (test_space_set_update_name_succeeds); two more remain. The tests have independent oracles (DB check, notUpdated.is_empty()) so they won't miss bugs, but the assertions are misleading. Fix: use .as_object().unwrap().contains_key(id).
close_reason: Fixed: contains_key() replaces is_null() in two tests
